tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork11 (Urban Cityscape — Deluxe)
tags.description: Major upgrade of the procedural city sketch. Two-layer parallax skyline (background muted, foreground full detail). Full water reflection via p.get() + vertically flipped p.image() below the horizon, overlaid with tinted gradient and animated ripple lines. 85 twinkling stars (sin-phase brightness). Crescent moon with triple-ring glow. 4 drifting multi-blob clouds. Wing-flapping birds (arc height modulated by sin). Window flicker toggles ~4% of lights every 3 seconds. Pulsing red antenna beacons with glow halo. Neon mode adds per-building pulsing coloured signs. Rain uses deterministic index+frameCount positioning (no array needed). Light shimmer dots on water for neon/golden/sunset. 7 curated HSB palettes. 400×500 canvas.
